ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Centre-Forward, Midfielder) */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height_cm" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight_kg" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "captain" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player is a captain */,
  "youth_team" INTEGER /* Indicates if the player came through the club's youth team */,
  "social_media_handle" TEXT /* Social media handle of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* League the club plays in */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the club is based */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the club plays */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the club was established */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  "budget" REAL /* Annual budget of the club */,
  "squad_size" INTEGER /* Number of players in the squad */,
  "fan_base_size" INTEGER /* Estimated number of fans */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "ownership" TEXT /* Name of the club's owner or ownership group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player involved in the transfer */,
  "source_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is transferring from */,
  "destination_club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club the player is transferring to */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Transfer fee in pounds (GBP) */,
  "transfer_movement" TEXT /* Type of transfer (e.g., Loan, Permanent) */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date of the transfer */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the transfer took place */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* League the transfer is associated with */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the transfer */,
  "transfer_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the transfer in months (for loans) */,
  "transfer_conditions" TEXT /* Any special conditions or clauses in the transfer */,
  "transfer_impact_rating" REAL /* Initial rating of the transfer impact */,
  "transfer_rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the transfer impact rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_league_name FOREIGN KEY ("league_name") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_destination_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("destination_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_source_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_transfer_movement FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_movement") REFERENCES transfer_movements ("movement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Date the contract starts */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* Date the contract ends */,
  "salary_per_week" REAL /* Weekly salary of the player */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., Short-term, Long-term) */,
  "agent_fee" REAL /* Agent fee paid for the contract */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the agent */,
  "contract_extension_options" TEXT /* Any options for extending the contract */,
  "contract_breaches" INTEGER /* Number of contract breaches */,
  "contract_clauses" TEXT /* Additional clauses in the contract */,
  "performance_bonuses" TEXT /* Details of performance-related bonuses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_club_id FOREIGN KEY ("club_id") REFERENCES clubs ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played by the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season in which the performance was recorded */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* League the performance is associated with */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the performance */,
  "injuries" INTEGER /* Number of injuries during the season */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (for goalkeepers and defenders) */,
  "successful_tackles" INTEGER /* Number of successful tackles (for defenders and midfielders) */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy percentage */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_season FOREIGN KEY ("season") REFERENCES seasons ("season_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_performance_league_name FOREIGN KEY ("league_name") REFERENCES leagues ("league_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the league (e.g., 1 for top tier, 2 for second tier) */,
  "number_of_teams" INTEGER /* Number of teams in the league */,
  "championship_format" TEXT /* Format of the league championship (e.g., Round-robin, Knockout) */,
  "promotion_relegation_rules" TEXT /* Promotion and relegation rules of the league */,
  "top_scorer" TEXT /* Name of the top scorer in the league */,
  "top_assister" TEXT /* Name of the top assister in the league */,
  "average_attendance" INTEGER /* Average attendance in the league */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., 1995/1996) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* ID of the league the season is associated with */,
  "champions" TEXT /* Name of the league champions */,
  "relegated_teams" TEXT /* Names of the relegated teams */,
  "promoted_teams" TEXT /* Names of the promoted teams */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfer_movements" (
  "movement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer movement type */,
  "movement_type" TEXT /* Type of transfer movement (e.g., Loan, Permanent) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the transfer movement type */,
  "standard_duration" INTEGER /* Standard duration for the transfer movement type */,
  "common_conditions" TEXT /* Common conditions associated with the transfer movement type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., scout, manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to (e.g., scouting, management) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access the user has (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the platform was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfer_analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the transfer */,
  "transfer_fee_change" REAL /* Change in transfer fee compared to previous transfers */,
  "player_performance_change" REAL /* Change in player performance metrics post-transfer */,
  "team_performance_change" REAL /* Change in team performance metrics post-transfer */,
  "transfer_impact_rating" REAL /* Rating of the transfer impact (1-10) */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date when the analysis was performed */,
  "transfer_rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the transfer impact rating */,
  "financial_impact" REAL /* Financial impact of the transfer on the club */,
  "media_impact" REAL /* Media and public sentiment impact of the transfer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfer_analytics_transfer_id FOREIGN KEY ("transfer_id") REFERENCES transfers ("transfer_id")
)
